ThingDef.Name: TMM_Uniform_FBICapBase
ThingDef.description: A baseball cap emblazoned with 'FBI' on it, the best accessory for crushing internal dissent.

ThingDef.Name: TMM_Uniform_FBIJacketBase
ThingDef.description: A jacket used by former federal agents belonging to the FBI, wonder if your colonists will be respected when they show up to raid somewhere if they wear these?

ThingDef.label: FBI Vest
ThingDef.description: A vest designed for the FBI during raids, not super useful against real threats, but you look cool when cracking down on protestor groups.

ThingDef.label: IRS Jacket
ThingDef.description: A jacket used by former federal agents belonging to the IRS, not entirely sure many groups on rimworlds will respect that authority to pay taxes though, suppose it's worth a try.

ThingDef.label: IRS Vest
ThingDef.description: A vest designed for the IRS during raids, strangely has armour plates, and not much space for calculators. Wait, why are taxmen raiding with weapons?

ThingDef.label: Beat Cop Hat
ThingDef.description: A police officer cap use for Patrol or formal.

ThingDef.label: British Police Cap
ThingDef.description: A british police officer cap, normally used by Sergeant or higher rank in british police service.

ThingDef.label: Police Cap
ThingDef.description: A baseball cap used for Law Enforcement.

ThingDef.label: Police Jacket
ThingDef.description: A jacket used for police officer in cold weather or duty.
A formal shirt for police officer.
ThingDef.label: Police shirt

ThingDef.description: A formal shirt for police officer with tie.
ThingDef.label: Police Shirt (Tie)
Stab Vest (Police)
ThingDef.description: An Anti-Stab vest designed for Law Enforcement Officer.

ThingDef.label: Ranger Hat
ThingDef.description: A general Ranger hat can be used for Ranger or some Sheriff's Depermant.

ThingDef.label: Sheriff Cap
ThingDef.description: A baseball cap used for Law Enforcement.

ThingDef.label: Sheriff Jacket
ThingDef.description: A jacket used for sheriff's office deputy in cold weather or duty.

ThingDef.label: Deputy Shirt
ThingDef.description: A formal shirt for Sheriff's office deputy.

ThingDef.label: Deputy Shirt (Tie)
ThingDef.description: A formal shirt for sheriff's office deputy with tie.

ThingDef.label: Anti-Stab Vest (Sheriff)
ThingDef.description: An Anti-Stab vest designed for Law Enforcement Officer.

ThingDef.label: Trooper Hat (Gold)
ThingDef.description: A hat in widespread use by law enforcement groups on the less desolate rimworlds, mostly on the super highways that criss-cross the worlds where some form of legal structures exist. This variant is gold, denoting a senior officer.

ThingDef.label: Trooper Hat (Silver)
ThingDef.description: A hat in widespread use by law enforcement groups on the less desolate rimworlds, mostly on the super highways that criss-cross the worlds where some form of legal structures exist. This variant is silver, denoting a junior officer.

Webbing is a strong fabric woven as a flat strip or tube of varying width and fibres, often used in place of rope. It is a versatile component used in climbing, slacklining, furniture manufacturing, automobile safety, auto racing, towing, parachuting, military apparel, load securing, and many other fields.\n\nThis variant of police belt is a Safariland Glock configuration belt.
ThingDef.label: Safariland G17 police belt

ThingDef.description: Webbing is a strong fabric woven as a flat strip or tube of varying width and fibres, often used in place of rope. It is a versatile component used in climbing, slacklining, furniture manufacturing, automobile safety, auto racing, towing, parachuting, military apparel, load securing, and many other fields.\n\nThis variant of police belt is a Safariland Beretta configuration belt.
ThingDef.label: Safariland M9 police belt

ThingDef.description: Webbing is a strong fabric woven as a flat strip or tube of varying width and fibres, often used in place of rope. It is a versatile component used in climbing, slacklining, furniture manufacturing, automobile safety, auto racing, towing, parachuting, military apparel, load securing, and many other fields.\n\nThis variant of police belt is the Python variant from Tex Shoemaker.
ThingDef.label: Python police belt

ThingDef.Name: TMM_Uniform_ATFCapBase
ThingDef.description: A baseball cap emblazoned with 'ATF' on it, for when you need an excuse to burn down a farm or two.

ThingDef.Name: TMM_Uniform_ATFJacketBase
ThingDef.description: A jacket used by former federal agents belonging to the ATF, perhaps it can be used by your own colonists to get away with things, it's not like the federal government exists out here.

ThingDef.label: ATF SWAT Vest
ThingDef.description: A vest designed for the ATF during raids where there actually was firearms present, offers more protection, but nothing super major. It's still only a vest after all.

ThingDef.label: ATF Vest
ThingDef.description: A vest designed for the ATF during raids where there was very little F, but more A and T, still enough to stop some plinkers, but nothing too protective.

ThingDef.Name: TMM_Uniform_DEACapBase
ThingDef.description: A baseball cap emblazoned with 'DEA' on it, the perfect accessory to seize drugs on the rim, and then dispose of them, in a series of small, localised fires.

ThingDef.label: DEA Jacket
ThingDef.description: A jacket used by former federal agents belonging to the DEA, for taking away all the drugs and disposing of them properly. Huh, there's a lighter and rolling papers in one of the pockets.

ThingDef.label: DEA Vest
ThingDef.description: A vest designed for the DEA during raids night and day, it offers little meaningful protection, but a lot of pockets.

ThingDef.Name: TMM_Uniform_P100NBase
ThingDef.description: When the urbworlds protest, the P100N helmets come out. Designed originally for law enforcement groups on core worlds, these helmets have shock resistant visors to protect against most missiles thrown by workers.

ThingDef.label: PANTAC Body Armour (pouches)
ThingDef.description: PANTAC SWAT vest, a vest in widespread use by various law enforcement groups across the core worlds, this variation has pouches for storage of all sorts.

ThingDef.label: PANTAC Body Armour
ThingDef.description: PANTAC SWAT vest, a vest in widespread use by various law enforcement groups across the core worlds.

ThingDef.label: Riot Vest
ThingDef.description: When the urbworlds protest, the riot vests come out. Designed originally for law enforcement groups on core worlds, these vests have made their way across the universe wherever workers deigned to have disagreements.

ThingDef.label: Max-Tac Helmet
ThingDef.description: Sporting multiple cameras and augmented reality lenses, this helmet's arrival used to be a sure sign for civilians to scarper on the core world of 'Earth', worn by the most feared of the NCPD; Max-Tax.

ThingDef.label: NCPD Hat
ThingDef.description: An iconic peaked cap worn by police officers from antiquity to current day on certain core and rimworlds that maintain a semblance of old world culture, this cap however, is emblazoned with the NCPD logo.

ThingDef.label: NCPD Uniform
ThingDef.description: A uniform designed by Night Corp and worn by police officers that once patrolled their cities on the Ruinworld known as 'Earth', how the iconic design made its way past the core worlds is unknown.

ThingDef.label: NCPD Vest
ThingDef.description: Whilst not much protection when dealing with what became of the Ruinworld it originated from, this armoured vest used to be a staple for NCPD officers against weapons wielded by the gangs that swarmed the streets they patrolled.
